title: Marvel Avengers 6pc Grab and Go Play Pack Coloring Book for Boys Ages 3 and Up
description:
Is your child obsessed with superheroes? This officially licensed Marvel coloring book features superheroes from the hit comic book and movie franchise - The Incredible Hulk, Thor, Black Widow, and more! The large activity book is the perfect size for occupying your child during long car rides and travel. It will easily fit inside most standard backpacks, book bags, or binders for even more on-the-go fun. It also comes with a sheet of stickers for additional stationery options. The Avengers coloring book comes with different pages for coloring, puzzles, and games like connect the dots, matching, counting, and more. Activity books are great for encouraging creativity and imagination while kids learn about math and drawing

Marvel Avengers 6pc Grab and Go Play Pack Coloring Book for Boys Ages 3 and Up

Is your child obsessed with superheroes? This officially licensed Marvel coloring book features superheroes from the hit comic book and movie franchise - The Incredible Hulk, Thor, Black Widow, and more!

Key Features

  • AVENGERS COLORING BOOK - Officially licensed Marvel coloring book features superheroes from the hit comic book and movie franchise - The Incredible Hulk, Thor, Black Widow, and more
  • JUMBO-SIZED ACTIVITY BOOK - 24page large activity book fits inside most standard backpacks, book bags, or binders for on-the-go fun; Comes with a cool sticker sheet
  • EDUCATIONAL GIFT - Avengers coloring book comes with pages for coloring, puzzles, and games like connect the dots, counting, matching, and more; Encourages creativity and imagination
  • CRAYONS INCLUDED - Jumbo-sized coloring book comes with 4 different colors of crayons for kids to doodle and color with; It Great for coloring while in the car or at school
  • SAFE FOR KIDS - All pieces included are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Choking hazard (small parts)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 1066524
  • UPC: 805219579688
  • Color: Avengers
  • Size: 6pc

The large activity book is the perfect size for occupying your child during long car rides and travel. It will easily fit inside most standard backpacks, book bags, or binders for even more on-the-go fun. It also comes with a sheet of stickers for additional stationery options.

The Avengers coloring book comes with different pages for coloring, puzzles, and games like connect the dots, matching, counting, and more. Activity books are great for encouraging creativity and imagination while kids learn about math and drawing.

Each activity book comes with 4 different colors of crayons, and the pages feature perforated edges that will allow your child to easily rip out their artwork to display at home or at school. All pieces included are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision.
